title: woof plan
description: Stage 3 Breakdown output: ordered stories implementing an epic. Validates structural shape only; cross-artefact invariants (satisfies[] subset of EPIC.md.observable_outcomes[].id, depends_on[] subset of stories[].id, every CD implemented by exactly one story, paths globs disjoint where required) are enforced by Stage-5 helper Check 5.

goal.description: One-sentence prose summary of the epic outcome.

intent.description: Prose, 1-2 sentences: what this story produces.

paths.description: Glob patterns the story is allowed to touch (using git-pathspec syntax). Stage 5 Check 3 fails if the diff includes files outside these globs.

satisfies.description: Outcome IDs from EPIC.md.observable_outcomes this story realises. Stage 3 prompt rejects zero-outcome stories.

implements_contract_decisions.description: Contract-decision IDs this story is the surface creator for. Each CD in EPIC.md must appear in exactly one story's implements_contract_decisions across the plan (helper-validated).

uses_contract_decisions.description: Contract-decision IDs this story consumes (without creating). Multiple stories may use the same CD.

depends_on.description: Story IDs that must reach status=done before this story runs. Subset relationship to stories[].id is helper-checked.

count.description: Estimated number of new tests. Not enforced at Stage 5.

types.description: Test families (unit, integration, e2e, regression, ...). Project-defined.

empty_diff.description: True iff this story completed without producing a diff because earlier stories' changes already realised its outcomes. Only meaningful when status=done. Per current operator policy, empty-diff completions during dogfood open a story_gate (triggered_by includes 'empty_diff_review') rather than auto-completing.
